description_long: This is a golden-brown muffin with a domed top, featuring visible blueberries embedded throughout the surface, some of which have burst and stained the surrounding crumb with deep purple hues. The muffin's exterior is slightly uneven and textured, with a crisp, lightly browned crust on top and a softer, lighter-colored body. It is encased in a pleated, light brown paper wrapper that extends from the base to just below the crown. The muffin appears moist and fluffy, with a few cracks and crevices on the top where the batter has risen and split during baking. The blueberries are distributed unevenly, with some concentrated patches and others more sparsely scattered. There are no visible decorative elements or frosting, giving it a classic, homemade appearance.
description: A golden-brown blueberry muffin with a domed, textured top and a pleated paper wrapper. Blueberries are visible on the surface, some bursting and staining the crumb.
description_view_0: The muffin is seen from the front, showing a rounded top with two prominent blueberries and a lightly browned, textured crust.
description_view_1: This side view highlights a large blueberry near the edge and more pronounced browning on the upper right, with the wrapper's pleats clearly visible.
description_view_2: The muffin's top displays several blueberries, some slightly sunken, and a more even golden color across the surface.
description_view_3: This view shows a cluster of blueberries near the top center, with a slightly darker, more caramelized crust on the upper left.
